data.body:
Gov. Kathy Hochul has proposed a tax on second homes in the city worth more than $5 million.

Hochul called the policy a “targeted surcharge” on “homes that, in many cases, sit vacant for a large part of the year.”

“They're part of our skyline, but those people are not part of our city,” she said.
